initiatives.title: RANGE AI research compute investment
initiatives.description: Rice’s RANGE system provides 80 NVIDIA H100 and H200 GPUs for AI-intensive research in energy, health, urban innovation, climate modeling, medical imaging, and materials science.
initiatives.significance: This closes Rice’s public compute-capacity gap with a named AI GPU engine and disclosed GPU count.

research_centers.name: AI research or coordination activity
research_centers.focus: Public AI research, teaching, or tool coordination evidenced in cited sources.

computing_infrastructure.summary: Rice’s Center for Research Computing documents multiple GPU-capable clusters. The new RANGE system, the Rice AI Networked GPU Engine, includes 80 NVIDIA H100 and H200 GPUs for AI research, while RAPID is a GPU-only cluster with 80 Nvidia GPUs and NOTS/ARIES add additional annual GPU-hour capacity. The recorded gpu_count reflects the named RANGE AI system rather than all Rice GPU resources.

equity_and_access_initiatives.title: OpenStax AI-enhanced learning access
equity_and_access_initiatives.description: Rice’s OpenStax partnership with Microsoft integrates free, peer-reviewed OER content into AI-enhanced learning; OpenStax reports nearly $3.4B in cumulative student savings and use across 72% of U.S. colleges.

regulatory_context.summary: State and system AI context checked only at high level; institution-level sources carry the profile.

narrative_summary: Rice University now has a much clearer AI compute and outcomes profile. RANGE, the Rice AI Networked GPU Engine, publicly adds 80 NVIDIA H100/H200 GPUs for AI research; CRC pages also document RAPID, a separate GPU-only 80-Nvidia-GPU cluster, plus NOTS and ARIES GPU-hour capacity. OpenStax partnerships add the strongest public student-impact evidence: OpenStax content is being integrated into Microsoft Learning Zone on Copilot+ PCs, and OpenStax reports nearly $3.4 billion in cumulative student savings with use across 72% of U.S. colleges. Exact enterprise campus LLM licensing, RANGE dollar cost, and Rice-student-specific outcome metrics remain undisclosed.

site:researchcomputing.rice.edu RAPID 80 Nvidia GPUs Rice HPC
site:rice.edu OpenStax Microsoft Learning Zone AI student savings
gaps_acknowledged: Leadership names and enrollment were not populated in this missing-only sweep.
Rice now has public AI GPU capacity through RANGE, but RANGE capital cost and full all-cluster current GPU total were not disclosed.
No campus-wide commercial generative-AI platform license, active-user count, or contract value was found; OpenStax outcomes are global rather than Rice-student-specific.
